CREATE TABLE bitstrings (id INTEGER, bs1 BITSTRING, bs2 BITSTRING);
SELECT bs1 & bs2 FROM bitstrings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT bs1 & bs2 FROM bitstrings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM bitstrings WHERE id > 1);
WITH temp AS (SELECT bs1 & bs2 AS result FROM bitstrings) SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp WHERE result = '10001'::BITSTRING;
SELECT a.id, a.bs1 & b.bs2 FROM bitstrings a JOIN bitstrings b ON a.id != b.id;
SELECT (bs1 & '00111'::BITSTRING) AS modified_bs FROM bitstrings WHERE bs1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT (bs1 & bs2 & '11111'::BITSTRING) AS combined FROM bitstrings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM bitstrings WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 3);
CREATE TABLE more_bitstrings (id INTEGER, bs BITSTRING);
SELECT b1.bs & b2.bs FROM bitstrings b1, more_bitstrings b2 WHERE b1.id = 1 AND b2.id = 2;
SELECT bs1 & (SELECT bs2 FROM bitstrings WHERE id = 2) AS result FROM bitstrings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT (bs1 & bs2) AS first_bitwise, (bs1 | bs2) AS second_bitwise FROM bitstrings;
CREATE VIEW vw_bitwise AS SELECT id, bs1 & bs2 AS bitwise_result FROM bitstrings;
SELECT * FROM vw_bitwise WHERE bitwise_result IS NOT NULL;
